name: interview-stack-guide
description: Full-stack interview reference: Next.js, NoSQL/GraphQL duality, CI/CD, AWS/Kubernetes deployment

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,next,react -c blue,green,cyan "npm run dev -w @interview/api" "npm run dev -w @interview/web" "npm run dev -w @interview/react-spa"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @interview/validation && npm run build -w @interview/db && npm run build -w @interview/events && npm run build -w @interview/graphql && npm run build -w @interview/api && npm run build -w @interview/web && npm run build -w @interview/react-spa
